The show

I came. I saw.
I gave my opinion.

Half beauty ritual, half group-chat confessional. Each week Alicia sits down at the mic, picks a fresh coat, and works through the stuff we all have feelings about — the salon, the situationships, the self-care that's actually just procrastination.

No brand-safe mush, no fake nice. Just honest takes delivered with a steady hand and a bold color. You don't have to agree. You just can't come plain.
